title: Double murder accused abandons bail application
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The man accused of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The man accused of murdering well-known KwaNonqaba residents Nwabisa Baliso (46) and Luvuyo Mgwelana abandoned his bail application during his appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Wednesday 19 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The man accused of murdering well-known KwaNonqaba residents Nwabisa Baliso (46) and Luvuyo Mgwelana abandoned his bail application during his appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Wednesday 19 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vusumzi Ntsodolo (49) was arrested shortly after Mgwelana’s body was found inside his Mfuleni home and Baliso’s was found in hers in Bantom Street on 8 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He made his first appearance in court on 11 November, when the court heard that he was facing a charge of murder and murder related to domestic violence, and that the State intended to oppose bail.","html":"He made his first appearance in court on 11 November, when the court heard that he was facing a charge of murder and murder related to domestic violence, and that the State intended to oppose bail."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ntsodolo abandoned his application, and the matter was postponed for further investigation.","html":"Ntsodolo abandoned his application, and the matter was postponed for further investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is expected to appear in court again on 20 February.","html":"He is expected to appear in court again on 20 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, previously told Mossel Bay Advertiser that the motive for the murders is still under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Phumeza Ngwane tries to hold back the tears during the picket outside the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court at the time of Vusumzi Ntsodolo's first appearance in court. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse","html":"Phumeza Ngwane tries to hold back the tears during the picket outside the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court at the time of Vusumzi Ntsodolo's first appearance in court. Photo: Chelsea Pieterse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
